title: Sharing Makes More Fun
lesson: Sharing your toys makes playtime more fun for everyone.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a sunny backyard garden, sitting on a soft picnic blanket happily playing with a pile of colourful building blocks. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a cheerful smile. Warm natural sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A storybook scene on the same sunny garden picnic blanket. The person from the input image sits on the far left, turned toward the camera with their face clearly visible, holding a colourful toy block a little close. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} walks up with open hands and a hopeful, friendly smile, wanting to join the play. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On the same garden picnic blanket, the person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a kind, gentle smile, holding out a colourful building block to offer it. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
